items.title: Pulsar-V in-order core - Crab
items.text: Welcome to official Crab Core documentation, a in-order core implementing RV64GC.

items.title: About Project
items.text: Crab is a in-order Risc-V core (hart) desing to implement RV64GC ISA for GP CPU usage. It is performance optimized both for FPGA and ASIC implementation.

items.title: Structure of Documentation
items.text:
Documentation is structured as follows:

  • Microarchitecture (uArch): Detailed documantation of each module design

Project Status

Documentaion is currently in continous development and it's current status isDraft.
